title: Aureline collaboration shared-object class, authority, durability, export-posture, and anchor-drift vocabulary
description: Boundary schema for the shared_object_record, shared_object_authority_transition_record, shared_object_anchor_drift_record, and shared_object_audit_event_record frozen in docs/collaboration/session_authority_contract.md. Every object that flows across a collaboration session resolves to one shared_object_record carrying exactly one shared_object_class_class (editor_buffer, anchored_comment, follow_or_presenter_state, shared_terminal_control_metadata, shared_debug_control_metadata, sealed_session_archive), exactly one shared_object_authority_class, exactly one shared_object_durability_class, exactly one shared_object_export_posture_class, the originating owner_actor_ref, the bound session_ref, and the optional supersedes_shared_object_ref / superseded_by_shared_object_ref. An anchored_comment row that re-anchors to a new target MUST mint a new shared_object_record with supersedes_shared_object_ref naming the prior row; silent relocation denies with silent_anchor_relocation_forbidden. An anchored_comment row whose target moved or was deleted MUST cite a paired shared_object_anchor_drift_record carrying exactly one anchor_drift_state_class from the closed vocabulary (anchor_target_match_exact, anchor_target_match_with_label_only, anchor_target_drift_label_unmatched_relocation_forbidden, anchor_target_drift_target_deleted_relocation_forbidden, anchor_target_drift_local_only_no_remote_resolution); an anchor row that omits the drift state denies with anchor_drift_state_unresolved. A follow_or_presenter_state row carries presenter_authoritative_for_view_only and never confers mutating authority; a row that asserts mutation through a presenter denies with presenter_authority_does_not_confer_mutation. A driver_authoritative_for_named_action row names the lane (terminal, debug, runbook) it admits and denies with driver_authority_does_not_widen_to_other_lanes when invoked outside the named lane. Raw buffer text, raw terminal bytes, raw debug payloads, raw URLs, raw endpoint hostnames, raw absolute paths, raw user identifiers, raw billing-account ids, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, raw model weights, raw pack bytes, and raw provider payloads never cross this boundary; this schema carries opaque refs, structured fields, reviewable sentence labels, and coarse buckets only. The eventual collaboration crate's Rust types are the schema of record; this file is the cross-tool boundary every non-owning surface reads. Adding a new shared_object_class_class, shared_object_authority_class, shared_object_durability_class, shared_object_export_posture_class, anchor_drift_state_class, driver_lane_class, audit_event_id, or denial_reason value is additive-minor and requires a shared_object_schema_version bump; repurposing an existing value is breaking and requires a new decision row.

shared_object_schema_version.description: Integer schema version for this shared-object vocabulary export. Current value is 1. Bumped only on breaking payload changes; additive-optional fields do not bump this version.

record_kind.description: Discriminator for the concrete payload shape. Every record carries exactly one kind.

opaque_id.description: Opaque, stable id safe to log, safe on RPC, safe in manifests / journal entries / support bundles / evidence packets / claim manifests / admin-collaboration consoles. Raw buffer text, raw terminal bytes, raw debug payloads, raw URLs, raw absolute paths, raw user identifiers, raw API keys, raw OAuth tokens, raw mTLS material, and raw provider payloads never appear here.

monotonic_timestamp.description: ISO 8601 UTC timestamp produced from a monotonic clock source.

reviewable_sentence.description: Short human-readable sentence safe to show on shared-object inspectors, drift readouts, presenter chips, and admin-collaboration surfaces. Never contains raw buffer text, raw terminal bytes, raw debug payloads, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.

shared_object_class_class.description: Frozen six-class shared-object vocabulary. editor_buffer = a buffer projection (cursor positions, selection, awareness, optionally CRDT-mergeable text deltas). anchored_comment = a review-style comment anchored to a buffer location, line range, or graph node. follow_or_presenter_state = cursor-follow / presenter handoff / role badge / focus broadcast. shared_terminal_control_metadata = read-only or driver-marked transcript chunks, signal / kill control admission, paste posture (metadata only; raw terminal bytes never cross this boundary). shared_debug_control_metadata = read-only or driver-marked debug events, breakpoint authoring authority, step / continue admission (metadata only; raw debug payloads never cross this boundary). sealed_session_archive = the terminal archive minted when the session reaches archived. A surface that collapses two classes into one row denies with shared_object_class_collapse_forbidden.

shared_object_authority_class.description: Frozen authority-class vocabulary. host_workspace_authoritative = owner's workspace authority is source of truth. participant_authoritative_within_session_only = within an admitted collaborative-edit session a participant's deltas are authoritative for the session projection only. presenter_authoritative_for_view_only = presenter directs follow / focus; never confers mutating authority. driver_authoritative_for_named_action = driver holds typed action authority for the named lane only (terminal, debug, runbook). approver_authoritative_for_admission = approver admits or refuses a typed action; never holds mutating authority itself. local_authoritative_no_session_authority = the row is a local projection; the session has no authority over it (this is the row class local editing falls under when relay loss removes session authority).

shared_object_durability_class.description: Frozen durability-class vocabulary. ephemeral_session_only = never written to durable storage; ends with the session. persisted_in_local_workspace = each side keeps a local copy; survives session end. persisted_in_local_workspace_for_owner_only = only the owner persists; participants hold ephemeral copies. persisted_in_remote_workspace = written to a remote-workspace authority; survives session end on that host. persisted_in_sealed_archive_only = only the sealed-archive shared object retains the row.

shared_object_export_posture_class.description: Frozen export-posture vocabulary. exportable_in_session_archive = the row is carried in the sealed archive at archive time. exportable_in_local_workspace_only = the row is exportable only through the participant's own workspace export path. exportable_metadata_only = only structured metadata (class, ref, drift label, timestamps) crosses an export boundary. not_exportable_ephemeral_only = the row never crosses an export boundary.

driver_lane_class.description: Frozen driver-lane vocabulary. A driver_authoritative_for_named_action authority MUST cite exactly one driver_lane_class; an action invoked outside the named lane denies with driver_authority_does_not_widen_to_other_lanes.

anchor_target_class.description: Frozen anchor-target vocabulary. Names what the anchored_comment was minted against; the drift record names how the target moved relative to that class.

anchor_drift_state_class.description: Frozen anchor-drift vocabulary. anchor_target_match_exact = anchor still resolves to the same byte range / node identity / path. anchor_target_match_with_label_only = byte range moved but a typed re-anchoring label still matches; the surface MUST display the label. anchor_target_drift_label_unmatched_relocation_forbidden = no match policy resolved; the row MUST display a typed drift label and MUST NOT silently relocate; surfaces that relocate without consent deny with silent_anchor_relocation_forbidden. anchor_target_drift_target_deleted_relocation_forbidden = the target row / line / node was deleted; the anchor is preserved as metadata-only with a typed deletion label and MUST NOT be relocated to a sibling. anchor_target_drift_local_only_no_remote_resolution = the participant's local copy diverged beyond the contract's match policy; the anchor remains local until rejoin re-resolves it under one of the other classes.

anchor_drift_match_label_kind.description: Frozen vocabulary for the typed re-anchoring label that admits anchor_target_match_with_label_only. no_match_label_available denies admission to that state.

shared_object_audit_event_id.description: Frozen audit-event ids on the collaboration_shared_object stream. Events MUST NOT carry raw buffer text, raw terminal bytes, raw debug payloads, raw URLs, raw paths, or raw credential material.

shared_object_denial_reason.description: Frozen denial-reason vocabulary. Denials fail closed; silent anchor relocation, presenter mutation, and driver-cross-lane invocation are all explicit denials rather than admitted edge cases.

driver_lane_class.description: REQUIRED when shared_object_authority_class is driver_authoritative_for_named_action; FORBIDDEN otherwise.

buffer_ref.description: Opaque ref to the buffer / journal / graph the row binds to. REQUIRED when shared_object_class_class is editor_buffer or anchored_comment.

supersedes_shared_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the prior shared_object_record this row supersedes. The supersede-rather-than-relocate rule (anchored_comment relocation) requires a fresh row with this field set; silent in-place relocation denies with silent_anchor_relocation_forbidden.

superseded_by_shared_object_ref.description: Opaque ref to the row that supersedes this one (set on the prior row when its replacement is minted).

sealed_archive_inventory_summary_label.description: REQUIRED when shared_object_class_class is sealed_session_archive. Names what the archive seal carries in reviewable form; the machine-readable inventory lives on the paired collaboration_session_downgrade_record (downgrade_kind_class = archive_sealing_initiated).

shared_object_record.description: One-row description of a shared object at a point in time. Class binding is enforced by allOf gates so an editor_buffer row cannot present presenter authority, a follow_or_presenter_state row cannot claim mutating authority, a driver row must name its lane, and a sealed_session_archive row must declare its archival posture.

approval_ticket_ref.description: Optional ADR-0010 approval-ticket ref. REQUIRED whenever next_authority_class is driver_authoritative_for_named_action or approver_authoritative_for_admission and the prior_authority_class did not already admit it.

shared_object_authority_transition_recor.description: One-row description of an authority handoff on a shared object (presenter handoff, driver handoff, viewer fallback). Transitions to mutating authority require a paired approval-ticket ref; presenter handoffs never widen authority and are admitted without one.

anchor_drift_match_label_value.description: Reviewable label value (for example 'enclosing function name plus line offset 12'). Reviewable text only; raw buffer text never crosses this boundary.

shared_object_anchor_drift_record.description: One-row description of an anchor's drift state. anchor_target_drift_label_unmatched_relocation_forbidden and anchor_target_drift_target_deleted_relocation_forbidden FORBID silent relocation; the only legal way to re-anchor is to mint a fresh shared_object_record with supersedes_shared_object_ref pointing back to the prior row.

shared_object_audit_event_record.description: Audit-event row on the collaboration_shared_object stream. Denials carry exactly one denial_reason from the closed vocabulary so reviewers can resolve why a row was refused without guessing.
